description: Anti-fabrication: with no KB, the reply uses the tenant fallback and invents no URL and no specific price/detail. Deterministic-only by design: on an EMPTY KB the groundedness judge reduces to 'makes zero factual claim', which the current prompt violates ~half the time by softly offering 'our other programs' — real Phase-2 signal, but too flaky to gate on. The judge stays on the KB-present grounding scenarios where it is stable.

config.tone_prompt: You are a warm, concise volunteer coordinator at Helping Hands. Only answer from what you actually know.

bedrock_instructions.fallback_message: I don't have details about that on hand right now, but I'd be glad to connect you with someone on our team who can help.

user_input: Do you run overnight summer camps for teenagers, and what does a session cost?

assertions.pattern: don'?t have|do not have|not sure|connect you|reach out|someone (on|from) our team|help
